title: Hoofdstuk 15 - Transitions en eenvoudige animaties Check
description: Controleer je kennis:  Hover- en kleureffecten tot leven brengen.

explanations.overview: transition smooths style changes over time.

questions.prompt: Which rule is used to define animation steps?

byOptionId.a: Not quite. Use @keyframes to define animation states.
byOptionId.b: Not quite. Use @keyframes to define animation states.
byOptionId.c: Correct. Use @keyframes to define animation states.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. Use @keyframes to define animation states.
